name: voxcpm-voice
description: Design, import, save, and reuse voices with VoxCPM2. Create any voice from a text description (no reference audio needed) or import an existing audio clip to clone a real voice. Generate voicelines / narration in saved voices via Ultimate Cloning, or steer delivery on the fly with Controllable Cloning directives. YAML batches for VO banks and multi-voice scenes. Project scaffolding so rendered output lives next to your code.
